svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 153, 0), rgb(50, 181, 50));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 190px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(49, 67, 84), rgb(169, 184, 199)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(49, 67, 84), rgb(169, 184, 199));
